decision.value: Run API transactions under tenant-scoped RLS roles
decision.evidence: run under RLS roles, never the shared role

tradeoff.value: Connection setup is more involved but prevents missed filters
tradeoff.evidence: connection setup more involved, but it closes the missed-WHERE-clause escape hatch

alternative.value: Use a service-role token in normal requests

architecture_change.value: Set tenant claim before RLS transactions
architecture_change.evidence: transactions should set the tenant claim
